name: Revoke Fusion
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>融</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>合</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>棄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Discard 1 "Polymerization" to the Graveyard. Send 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard and Special Summon 1 monster from your hand that is listed as a Fusion Material Monster on that card. The Special Summoned monster is sent to the Graveyard during the End Phase of this turn.
eff: Discard 1 "Polymerization" to the Graveyard. Send 1 Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard and Special Summon 1 monster from your hand that is listed as a Fusion Material Monster on that card. The Special Summoned monster is sent to the Graveyard during the End Phase of this turn.

action: Sends from your Extra Deck to your Graveyard
Sends from your field to your Graveyard
